publishedAbstract: - After upgrade to ODF 4.21 OR on new installations of ODF 4.21 we may see a new alert, for all osd pods, example: ~~~ rook-ceph-osd-2-6c688d55bb-jbrtf 2/2 Running 0 1d 10.10.10.2 odfnode1 alertname = ODFNodeLatencyHighOnOSDNodes component = odf daemon_type = osd instance = 10.128.10.2 job = odf-blackbox-exporter namespace = openshift-storage openshift_io_alert_source = platform phase = rtt prometheus = openshift-monitoring/k8s severity = warning Annotations description = Node 10.128.10.2 has max ICMP RTT latency > 10ms over the last 24h. This may impact Ceph performance. runbook_url = https://github.com/openshift/runbooks/blob/master/alerts/openshift-container-storage-operator/ODFNodeLatencyHighOnOSDNodes.md summary = High ICMP latency (> 10ms) detected on ODF OSD node(s) ~~~- This was observed on ODF Internal mode configured with **ODF multus network** (cluster, public or boths) NOTE. This alert can bee seen in other ODF configuratons not using multus, but the root cause will be different.
publishedTitle: ODF 4.21 - Alert ODFNodeLatencyHighOnOSDNodes - Node IPaddress has max ICMP RTT latency > 10ms over the last 24h
